items.summary: Update the business name to 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' across every frontend file where the cafe's name appears. This includes: the Navbar logo/brand text, the Footer brand name, the Home page hero section and any headings that reference the business name, the Contact page business name display, and any other in-page text that currently reads 'Internet Cafe', 'Internet Cafe Services', or a generic placeholder name.

Update all SEO metadata site-wide to use 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' as the business name. This includes: the <title> tag and all meta description, Open Graph (og:title, og:site_name), Twitter card, and JSON-LD LocalBusiness 'name' field in frontend/index.html; and the per-page SEO titles and descriptions in SEOHead calls on the Home, Services, and Contact pages. The page titles should follow the pattern 'Rahul Cyber Cafe — [Page Subtitle]' and meta descriptions should reference 'Rahul Cyber Cafe' by name.
